name: browser-control
description: [DORMANT 2026-05-08] Legacy Playwright/CDP browser plugin — superseded by browser-harness which uses agent-browser CLI for reliability across long chat sessions. Files retained for typed-error reference (browser-harness's errors.py is a copy) + emergency reactivation via OPENCOMPUTER_USE_BROWSER_CONTROL_LEGACY=1. Original description: Single Browser tool (16 outer actions + 11 act-kinds) backed by the OpenClaw-port control service.
author: OpenComputer
